projectDescription: TrinaxAI is a local-first, open-source AI assistant that combines a cross-platform PWA chat interface, a developer CLI, RAG-powered code search, voice mode, and vision — all running entirely on your own machine with no cloud dependency.
keyFeatures: 100% local — no cloud, no subscriptions, all data stays on device
Hybrid RAG retrieval — vector (bge-m3) + BM25 keyword fusion with optional cross-encoder reranking
Multi-model auto-routing — heuristic classifier selects general/code/deep/fast models per query
AST-aware code indexing for 15+ programming languages with incremental re-indexing
Knowledge Collections — create separate RAG namespaces and query one or many
Local memory — 'remember that' facts persist across devices via shared state
Voice mode — speech recognition + text-to-speech for natural conversations
Vision support — analyze images and screenshots locally with qwen2.5-vl
Cross-platform PWA — installable on iOS, Android, and desktop with offline support
Developer CLI — trinaxai ask/chat/index/research/doctor and more
Spanish & English bilingual UI with system-preference auto-detection
One-command installers for Linux, macOS, and Windows
publicApiSurface: POST /v1/chat/completions — OpenAI-compatible streaming chat with RAG
POST /v1/research — deep multi-pass research with sub-question decomposition
GET /v1/sources — list indexed source files per collection
GET /v1/sources/{collection}/{file}/chunks — retrieve indexed chunks for a file
GET /health — system status: models, index, profile, features
POST /documents/extract — extract text from PDF/DOCX for temporary analysis
POST /system/reload — hot-reload RAG index from storage
POST /v1/watch/start — start filesystem watcher for auto-reindexing
trinaxai memory — manage persistent memory entries
trinaxai collections — list or manage RAG collections
trinaxai watch — start file watcher for auto-reindexing
trinaxai start / stop — start or stop all services
trinaxai --engine rag|ollama — force specific AI engine
